BackstoryDef.title: combat medic
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] graduted from a medical school and became a combat medic. Tending to wounded soldiers was difficult, but [PAWN_pronoun] took pride in [PAWN_possessive] ability to save lives.\n\nIt was a hard job and constant stress left [PAWN_objective] traumatized.

BackstoryDef.title: combat nurse
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] barely managed to pass medical school and was immediately shipped off to the frontlines as a combat nurse. [PAWN_pronoun] saved many lives, though [PAWN_possessive] poor social skills often alienated [PAWN_objective] from [PAWN_possessive] comrades.

BackstoryDef.title: mad paramedic
BackstoryDef.description: Years of some unspoken abuse broke [PAWN_nameDef]. A shell of [PAWN_possessive] former self, [PAWN_pronoun] excelled in [PAWN_possessive] job as a medic but struggled to even interact with others, let alone do any other work. Even the simplest of tasks became an impossible burden for [PAWN_objective].

BackstoryDef.title: sickly surgeon
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] studied medicine at a local university. [PAWN_pronoun] barely managed to pass her exams as [PAWN_pronoun] constantly got sick. The irony was not lost on [PAWN_objective].

BackstoryDef.title: combat medic
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] became a doctor to save lives and research medicine. [PAWN_pronoun] soon realized the only way to make progress on [PAWN_possessive] research was to perform experiments on human patients.\n\n[PAWN_pronoun] often used patients for [PAWN_possessive] experiments - whether they were willing or not.
